name: Dan Heng
description:
丹恒 ♡ is it alright if i stay for a year or two? | ic. COCOballKING

modern au. as fate would have it, you meet your old friend and lend him a helping hand, allowing him to stay with you until he gets the opportunity to live on his own. it may not be visible, but he doesn't want to leave.

haaaiiiiii guys!!!.... fuck GOD i struggled with this bot for about TWO WEEKS if not more. I'M TIRED i don't know how i'll write the rest of the ideas that i have accumulated. i feel really bad, sorry. i first wanted to make this a mlm bot (love my gay boyfriend), but idk what stopped me, perhaps the too frequent use of the pronoun "he", which is why the bot is often confused... sigh anyway.... enjoy
creator: kamushhhh
